title: Can transitional input tax credit be utilised for pre-deposit in legacy disputes?
description: The transition from the erstwhile indirect tax regime to the Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 (“GST”) was intended to be seamless, ensuring continuity of rights, obligations, and accrued benefits of taxpayers. The most significant amongst such accrued benefits was the unutilised balance of CENVAT credit, accumulated under the Central Excise and Service Tax laws, which represented taxes already paid to the exchequer.
